activities.title: Construct the square root spiral
activities.details: Student will be able to construct the square root spiral.

activities.title: Visualise algebraic identities using geometric models
activities.details: Use computational thinking strategies, such as decomposition and step-by-step procedures to visualise algebraic identities.

activities.title: Drawing graphs of linear equations when x and y assume only certain values
activities.details: Graph a pair of linear equations.

activities.title: Represent a floor plan on a grid using coordinates
activities.details: Specify locations and the position of one point relative to another point using coordinates.

activities.title: Constructing a square with a given side as described in the Baudhayana's Sulbasutras
activities.chapter_name: Introduction to Euclid's Geometry: Axioms and Postulates
activities.details: Explain the construction of a square as given in the Sulbasutras.

activities.title: Engage in drawing, measurement and paper manipulation activities to discover geometric patterns involving triangles and 4-gons
activities.details: Practice forming logical converses of statements.

activities.title: Identify cultural motifs involving circles, for example, the Dharmachakra, Ashoka Chakra, Sudarshan Chakra
activities.details: Use computational thinking to break down circle-related problems.

activities.title: Squaring a rectangle: Proof from Baudhayana's Sulbasutras
activities.details: Explain the classical problem of 'squaring' a given shape.

activities.title: Empirical probability: analysing statistical data and performing experiments
activities.details: Estimate the empirical probability of the occurrence of an event by analysing statistical data.

projects.title: Tower of Hanoi puzzle
projects.details: Solve the Tower of Hanoi puzzle.

projects.title: Fractals analysis using GP
projects.details: Analyse attributes of fractals using Geometric Progressions (GP).

practicals.title: Lab Practical activities from prescribed books
practicals.details: Lab activities to be done from the prescribed books: Guidelines for Mathematics Laboratory in Schools, class IX - CBSE Publication; Laboratory Manual - Mathematics, secondary stage - NCERT Publication.
